task.summary: Pages preview of /pages/project-dashboard/ on fix/projects-team-scoped-access alerts 'Could not load project.' and renders empty key information. Continue work on PR #252 to find a solution.
task.constraint: Continue work on PR #252 and its branch.

selectedBundles.reason: ResearchOps platform implementation surface (Worker deploy workflow + dashboard route-state).

skippedBundles.reason: No UI / content / accessibility surface changed.
No Airtable schema or formula change.
No Mural OAuth / workspace / board change.

precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond governs branch hygiene and CI/deploy workflow change. The branch trigger fix is workflow code under .github/workflows/.
ResearchOps Developer Control governs the platform's deployment surface, including the preview Worker that the Pages function proxy at functions/api/[[path]].js depends on.
Cloudflare governs the Wrangler deploy contract used by the preview Worker. The fix preserves the existing wrangler.passwordless-preview.toml; only the GitHub Actions trigger changes.

hypothesisAndEvidence.hypothesis: Pages preview is fresh but the preview Worker behind functions/api/[[path]].js is stale.
evidence: PR #252 is on fix/projects-team-scoped-access, so the preview Worker deploy never fires.
PR check_runs show Cloudflare Pages: researchops succeeded for cc17524 but no preview Worker deploy check is reported.
RECENT_LEARNINGS 2026-05-13 records the same class of regression for deploy-worker.yml and prescribes feature/** and fix/** branch filters.

alternativesConsidered: AIRTABLE_TABLE_DETAILS missing — ruled out: wrangler.passwordless-preview.toml declares the table.
CORS allow-list narrow — ruled out: worker.js applies isResearchOpsPagesOrigin fallback for *.researchops.pages.dev.
Client-side id mismatch — ruled out: listProjectRecords returns id = airtable record id and getProjectRecord accepts it (tested by tests/projects-route-contract.test.js).

changeSummary: Broadened push.branches for deploy-passwordless-preview-worker.yml to cover the approved work-branch prefixes (main, feature/**, chore/**, test/**, fix/**, perf/**, hotfix/**) so the preview Worker tracks the same branch class as the Pages preview.

Added a route-state pin in tests/project-dashboard-route-state.test.js asserting the workflow's branches list contains each approved prefix and no longer contains the single-branch hardcode. This is a guard against the filter silently drifting back.

Recorded a RECENT_LEARNINGS entry generalising the 2026-05-13 lesson: every preview Worker workflow that backs a *.researchops.pages.dev host must accept the approved branch prefixes, not only deploy-worker.yml.
validationRun: npx prettier -c on changed files — clean
validationNotRun: npm run lint — eslint dependency 'globals' unavailable in the sandbox; CI prettier and lint jobs cover this. Prettier already passes locally for the changed files.
residualRisks: Cloudflare Pages preview deployments are queued via Cloudflare's own pipeline. After this commit lands on the PR branch, the deploy-passwordless-preview-worker workflow will fire and update the preview Worker; the user must refresh the preview tab once both Pages and Worker deploys are green.
There is only one preview Worker (rops-api-passwordless-preview). If multiple PRs push concurrently they will race; the next push wins. The same constraint applies to deploy-worker.yml already.
This fix does not change the underlying API or auth contract for /api/projects/:id. The PR's existing contract tests already pin that surface.

repositoryEvidence: functions/api/[[path]].js routes preview Pages to rops-api-passwordless-preview.
RECENT_LEARNINGS records the 2026-05-13 regression and prescribes feature/** and fix/** filters.
PR #252 check_runs list shows no preview Worker deploy check.
implementationDecisions: Use the approved-prefix set verbatim from .agent-operating-model/trace-policy.md to keep deploy-passwordless-preview-worker.yml in lockstep with the operating model.
Pin the trigger with a route-state-style test on tests/project-dashboard-route-state.test.js so the dashboard's preview contract is co-pinned with the workflow.
assumptions: The Cloudflare-side wrangler.passwordless-preview.toml is the correct config for the preview Worker the Pages function proxies to. (Confirmed by name = rops-api-passwordless-preview.)
toolLimitations: Could not probe the live preview Worker from the sandbox host (host_not_allowed). Diagnosis is structural rather than live-traced.
validationResults: All targeted Node tests pass. Validate passes. Prettier passes for changed files.
